headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise As Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire; Tesla Earnings Due
summary: President Trump extended an Iran ceasefire after the stock market fell on canceled talks. Tesla earnings are on deck.

headline: Caterpillar, IBD Stock Of The Day, Rises In Buy Zone Amid Data Center Strength
summary: Caterpillar is Tuesday's IBD Stock Of The Day as the Dow Jones Industrial Average heavyweight got a big price target hike for the second straight day on AI data center demand and the broader industrial recovery taking shape.  CAT stock rose within a buy zone.  Wells Fargo raised its CAT stock price target to 960 from 970, keeping an overweight rating, according to The Fly investment site.

headline: Does United Rentals Stock Qualify As A Top-Tier Capital Compounder?
summary: United Rentals (URI) has grown net income at a 6% average clip over the past three years. Yet earnings per share have expanded by a much faster 9.3% over the same period.

raw.headline: Does United Rentals Stock Qualify As A Top-Tier Capital Compounder?

headline: Caterpillar Stock Can Gain 20%, Analyst Says. How Meta Might Give Shares a Boost.
summary: Monday, Well Fargo analyst Jerry Revich raised his Cat price target by 10% to $960 from $870. He kept his Buy rating on the stock.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Caterpillar, Raises Price Target to $960
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jerry Revich   maintains Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $870 to $960.
